raw_title: Pricing, Design and Cultivation – Conceptual Tools for the Normative Assessment of Fairness in the Age of Media Platformization
title_en: Pricing, Design and Cultivation – Conceptual Tools for the Normative Assessment of Fairness in the Age of Media Platformization
title_zh: 定价、设计与培育——媒体平台化时代公平性规范评估的概念工具
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在媒体越来越依赖平台的今天，如何评估这些平台是否公平。作者提出了三个概念工具——定价、设计和培育——来帮助判断平台是否公正对待用户和内容创作者。文章认为，我们需要新的方法来思考平台时代的公平问题。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how to assess fairness in media platforms as they become increasingly dominant. The authors propose three conceptual tools—pricing, design, and cultivation—to help evaluate whether platforms treat users and content creators fairly. The paper argues that new approaches are needed to think about fairness in the platform era.
research_direction_zh: 媒体平台化背景下的规范性评估框架研究，关注数字环境中公平性的概念构建与测量方法。
research_direction_en: Research on normative assessment frameworks in the context of media platformization, focusing on conceptual construction and measurement methods of fairness in digital environments.
